author: Badwolf_TW
description: Trap specific channels and temporarily ban users who speak there, then remove their recent messages.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store data or metadata about users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing. Use `[p]bottrap channel #channel` to set a trap channel.
name: BotTrap
short: Automatically temp-ban users that speak in trap channels.
